// Dr. Laura Harbach   const researcher = { name: "Laura Harbach", role: "Computational Researcher", at: "Brunel University London", domains: [ "Astrophysics", // M-dwarf space weather "Agent-Based Modeling", // Climate migration "Uncertainty Quantification" // HPC & policy ], tools: ["MHD", "ABM", "HPC", "Python", "C++"] };   console.log(researcher);
scroll
research domains

Two worlds, one methodology

Astrophysics

Exoplanet Atmospheres & Stellar Winds

3D Magnetohydrodynamic simulations of stellar wind interactions with close-in exoplanet atmospheres. Investigating how space weather from M-dwarf stars like AU Mic drives atmospheric escape and shapes observable Lyman-alpha signatures.

MHD Simulations Space Weather Lyman-α Photoevaporation AU Mic
Explore research →
ABM & Migration

Climate-Driven Human Displacement

Agent-Based Models simulating population displacement during flooding and climate disasters. Working with UNHCR to forecast refugee return patterns and inform humanitarian policy with transparent, rule-based algorithms over black-box ML.

Agent-Based Modeling DFlee UNHCR Bangladesh Ukraine
Explore research →
featured projects

Recent Research

Astrophysics · 2022

Space Weather & AU Mic b

Modelled how Extreme Coronal Mass Ejections from AU Microscopii alter Lyman-alpha absorption patterns during planetary transits, revealing the dominant role of stellar winds in atmospheric escape.

with Cohen, Drake, Garraffo + Details →
ABM · 2025

DFlee: Flood Displacement Model

Lead developer of DFlee — integrating USGS hydrological contexts with agent behavioural algorithms to simulate realistic evacuation timing, return decisions, and shelter-seeking across 160,000+ agents.

with Groen, Suleimenova + Details →
ABM · 2024

Ukrainian Refugee Return Forecasting

Predictive ABM prototype forecasting potential return pathways of Ukrainian refugees, presented ahead of the 2024 Ukraine Recovery Conference in partnership with UNHCR.

with UNHCR, Groen + Details →
selected work

Publications

  • 2025

    DFlee: An Agent-Based Model for Flood-Induced Population Displacement

    Harbach, L.M., Groen, D., et al. — Preprint, Research Square

    ABM Migration
  • 2024

    A Conceptual Approach to Agent-Based Modelling of Coping Mechanisms in Climate-Driven Flooding in Bangladesh

    Harbach, L.M., Groen, D., Jahani, A., et al. — ICCS 2024

    ABM Climate
  • 2022

    Space Weather-driven Variations in Lyα Absorption Signatures of Exoplanet Atmospheric Escape: MHD Simulations and AU Mic b

    Harbach, L.M., et al. — The Astrophysical Journal, 934(2), 189

    Astrophysics MHD
  • 2021

    Stellar Winds Drive Strong Variations in Exoplanet Evaporative Outflow Patterns and Transit Absorption Signatures

    Harbach, L.M., Moschou, S., Garraffo, C., Fraschetti, F., et al. — The Astrophysical Journal

    Astrophysics Stellar Winds
